Macro Definition Documentation

◆ MOCK_SYSCALL

#define MOCK_SYSCALL (   ret,
  name,
  ARG_TYPES,
  ARG_NAMES 
)
Value:
ret(*fake_##name) ARG_TYPES = 0; \
ret __wrap_##name ARG_TYPES { \
if (fake_##name) { \
return fake_##name ARG_NAMES; \
} else { \
return -1; \
} \
} \
int name##_calls = 0; \
ret count_##name ARG_TYPES { \
name##_calls++; \
return 0; \
}
